title: Catch Us at These Events
content: Exciting news! Bitcoin Dev Project will be at the MIT Bitcoin Expo this weekend in Cambridge, Massachusetts as well as the Bitcoin 2026 conference in Las Vegas, Nevada. Stop by our table at the MIT Bitcoin Expo to say hello to some of the team and grab stickers, or catch us at 11:50am on Saturday moderating “Inside Bitcoin Core: Building and Maintaining the Network”. For those that will be attending the Vegas conference, you can find us at 11:50am on 4/28 for “Interactive Strategies to Improve as a Bitcoin Educator + Q&A”, as well as 2:30pm on 4/29 for “Secure & Secret: Advancing Bitcoin Privacy as the Default”. We’ll also have a presence at the BTC Sessions workshops on Tuesday 4/28. We’d love to see you there!

title: Catch Us at These Events
content: Exciting news! Bitcoin Dev Project will be at the Bitcoin 2026 conference in Las Vegas. You can find us at 11:50am on 4/28 for “Interactive Strategies to Improve as a Bitcoin Educator + Q&A”, as well as 2:30pm on 4/29 for “Secure & Secret: Advancing Bitcoin Privacy as the Default”. We’ll also have a presence at the BTC Sessions workshops on Tuesday 4/28. We’d love to see you there!
